title: marianthus villosus
intro: Marianthus villosus, also known as hairy mariannine or hairy mint bush, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Marianthus villosus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal use.
